provides: An email trap (mail catcher) for dev/staging: outbound mail is captured into a TrappedEmail journal instead of being sent, and browsed through a read-only, scope-filtered Mail API. Plugs into stapel-notifications' email-provider seam by dotted path (duck-typed send() contract) — no module-to-module import.

curated.summary: Store the rendered HTML/text bodies on the row. A host that only needs the envelope (to/from/subject) for a lighter footprint can turn this off; bodies are then stored empty (conf.py, MODULE.md Settings table).
curated.business_label: Store full email bodies (vs. envelope only)

curated.summary: Hard cap on stored messages; the retention sweep deletes the oldest rows beyond this many. 0 disables the count cap (conf.py).

extension_points.name: SCOPE_PROVIDER
extension_points.summary: REPLACE, single strategy: a ScopeProvider subclass (filter(queryset, request)). Default is a no-op single global scope; a multi-tenant host filters so one tenant never reads another's trapped mail (scope.py, MODULE.md Extension point 2).

extension_points.name: notifications email provider
extension_points.summary: MailtrapEmailProvider implements notifications' duck-typed send(recipient, subject, html_body, headers) contract; wired via STAPEL_NOTIFICATIONS['EMAIL_PROVIDER'] = 'stapel_mailtrap.provider.MailtrapEmailProvider', no import either direction (provider.py, MODULE.md Extension point 3).

extension_points.name: serializer_seams
extension_points.summary: Both views carry response_serializer_class via SerializerSeamMixin (TrappedEmailListItemSerializer / TrappedEmailDetailSerializer); swap by subclassing and remounting (views.py:30-33, MODULE.md Extension point 4).

requires.reason: the only stapel-* dependency: AppSettings config layer (pyproject.toml dependency)
consumer of this module's email-provider seam via a duck-typed dotted path (STAPEL_NOTIFICATIONS['EMAIL_PROVIDER']); no direct import either direction (MODULE.md Extension point 3)
